entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: Holder of this worldview on data companies and proprietary data acquisition

entities.name: proprietary acquisition channel
entities.context: Data entry point that competitors cannot replicate regardless of capital

entities.name: data supremacy
entities.context: Unique control over a data asset that creates structural advantage

entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: Social platform whose graph exemplifies commoditized public data

entities.name: data-first models
entities.context: Product approach where the product itself generates unique non-public data

entities.name: structural moat
entities.context: Competitive advantage from non-replicable data sources that shifts dynamics from commodity arbitrage to monopoly

entities.name: behavioral signals
entities.context: Type of unique proprietary data generated by product usage

entities.name: private transactions
entities.context: Type of unique proprietary data from non-public activity
